body:
No API design or tooling issues found for this PR.

**Summary:** `@azure/arm-containerservice` 25.1.0-beta.1 (API version 2026-01-02-preview, beta release). All CI checks pass. CHANGELOG correctly compares with `25.0.0`. `apiRefLink` uses `?view=azure-node-preview` (appropriate for beta). All new operation groups (`IdentityBindingsOperations`, `JWTAuthenticatorsOperations`, `MeshMembershipsOperations`, `OperationStatusResultOperations`, `ContainerServiceOperations`, `VmSkusOperations`) expose proper return types — `get` operations return their respective resource types, delete operations return void as expected. All newly added `Known*` enums use PascalCase members. No `_N` suffix collisions, no `AutoGenerated` suffixes, no unexpected `void` or `unknown` returns found.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>


</details>
